reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request implements a comprehensive UI/UX redesign, introducing a glassmorphism aesthetic with animated background elements, updated typography, and enhanced component styling across the home and result pages. The review feedback focuses on improving web accessibility by applying aria-hidden="true" to decorative SVG icons and background blobs to ensure they are ignored by assistive technologies. Additionally, there is a recommendation to use more descriptive text instead of a question mark for missing data in the candidate list to maintain clarity for the user.
